'''Yarnil''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yarnil system/Legends|Yarnil system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was a [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] and merchants.<ref name="CCW" />
